entity.label: Abdon
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description:
One of the “sons” of Shashak (1 Chr. 8:23).

This is the name also of a Levitical town of the Gershonites, in the tribe of Asher (Josh. 21:30; 1 Chr. 6:74). The ruins of Abdeh, some 8 miles north-east of Accho, probably mark its site.

nodes.label: Abdon
nodes.description:

This is the name also of a Levitical town of the Gershonites, in the tribe of Asher (Josh. 21:30; 1 Chr. 6:74). The ruins of Abdeh, some 8 miles north-east of Accho, probably mark its site.

verses.text: And out of the tribe of Asher, Mishal with her suburbs, Abdon with her suburbs,
And out of the tribe of Asher; Mashal with her suburbs, and Abdon with her suburbs,
